_doc: Compiled from dysbiosis_taxa_assessment.md — Dysbiosis marker interpretation rules

F_nucleatum.detection_level: Species (cannot distinguish clade C1 commensal vs C2 pathogenic)
F_nucleatum.healthy_range: Undetectable to <0.01% in 70-80% of healthy individuals

notably_elevated.interpretation: Strong dysbiosis marker — assess SCFA context

F_nucleatum.metaPhlAn_limitation: Cannot distinguish pathogenic clade C2 from commensal C1

S_gallolyticus.detection_level: Species (cannot distinguish subsp. gallolyticus CRC vs pasteurianus not-CRC)
S_gallolyticus.healthy_range: Typically undetectable in >95% of healthy individuals

detected.interpretation: CRITICAL: subspecies identity unknown — clinical significance indeterminate

S_gallolyticus.metaPhlAn_limitation: Most critical limitation — only subsp. gallolyticus is CRC-associated, but MetaPhlAn cannot distinguish

E_Shigella.healthy_range: 0.5-3% typical, present in 80-90% of healthy individuals

absent.interpretation: Unusual — minimal facultative colonization, supports obligate anaerobe dominance

E_Shigella.metaPhlAn_limitation: Cannot detect pks+ genotoxin-producing strains (colibactin DNA damage)

all_absent.label: Reassuring
all_absent.interpretation: All four dysbiosis-associated taxa undetected, consistent with healthy compositional state
all_absent.client_text: No high-risk bacterial markers were detected — this is a positive sign for your gut health.

single_detected_low.label: Contextual
single_detected_low.interpretation: One taxon detected at low levels — assess in context of SCFA producers
single_detected_low.client_text: One marker was detected at low levels. This is common and not necessarily concerning, especially when your beneficial bacteria are active.

multiple_detected.label: Dysbiosis signature
multiple_detected.interpretation: Multiple taxa detected — compositional dysbiosis pattern present
multiple_detected.client_text: Several markers associated with gut imbalance were detected. This aligns with the other patterns we see and is something we can address.

convergent_with_low_scfa.label: Convergent dysbiosis
convergent_with_low_scfa.interpretation: Elevated dysbiosis taxa AND depleted SCFA producers — multiple lines of evidence indicate protein-driven dysbiotic state
convergent_with_low_scfa.client_text: Multiple indicators point toward an imbalanced gut environment where protein-fermenting bacteria have gained ground over beneficial ones. This is the most important area to address.

concordance_matrix.description: How dysbiosis markers align with SCFA/guild patterns

patterns.interpretation: Divergent — mixed signal, stable alternative state

recommend_followup_if: Any taxon above red flag threshold (F.n. >0.1%, S.g. detected, P.a. >0.5%, E-S >5%)
Multiple taxa (2+) detected simultaneously above trace
Elevated taxa + depleted SCFA producers (F.prausnitzii <2%, Roseburia <1%)
Client reports GI symptoms (chronic diarrhea, blood in stool, abdominal pain)
Personal history of polyps or IBD
monitor_only_if: Single taxon trace/borderline with robust SCFA producers
E-S 1-3% (healthy range) with no other markers

F_nucleatum.absent: Fusobacterium nucleatum undetected (<0.001%). Reassuring; no CRC-associated compositional marker present.
F_nucleatum.trace: Trace F. nucleatum detected ({abundance}%). Borderline; MetaPhlAn cannot distinguish pathogenic clade C2 from commensal C1. If SCFA robust, likely transient.
F_nucleatum.elevated: F. nucleatum elevated at {abundance}%. Dysbiosis marker; epidemiologically associated with CRC (36-132× enrichment). MetaPhlAn limitation: cannot confirm clade C2 (pathogenic).
F_nucleatum.significant: F. nucleatum notably elevated at {abundance}%. Strong dysbiosis marker with high CRC risk association. Clinical attention warranted if accompanied by GI symptoms or family history.

S_gallolyticus.absent: Streptococcus gallolyticus undetected. No compositional marker detected. Reassuring.
S_gallolyticus.detected: S. gallolyticus detected at {abundance}%. CRITICAL LIMITATION: MetaPhlAn cannot distinguish subsp. gallolyticus (CRC-associated) from subsp. pasteurianus (not CRC-associated). Clinical significance indeterminate without subspecies confirmation.

P_anaerobius.absent: Peptostreptococcus anaerobius undetected. No proteolytic dysbiosis marker present.
P_anaerobius.low: P. anaerobius low at {abundance}%. Normal variation; reassuring.
P_anaerobius.elevated: P. anaerobius elevated at {abundance}%. Dysbiosis marker associated with CRC and IBD. Indicates proteolytic metabolism shift.
P_anaerobius.significant: P. anaerobius significantly elevated at {abundance}%. Strong dysbiosis signature. Clinical follow-up recommended if symptomatic.

E_Shigella.absent: Escherichia-Shigella undetected. Unusual; indicates minimal facultative colonization, consistent with robust obligate anaerobe dominance.
E_Shigella.low_normal: E-S at {abundance}%. Low-normal; within healthy range. No dysbiosis marker.
E_Shigella.normal: E-S at {abundance}%. Within healthy range (0.5-3%). Normal commensal presence. MetaPhlAn cannot detect pks+ genotoxin-producing strains.
E_Shigella.elevated: E-S elevated at {abundance}%. Dysbiosis marker; above healthy range. MetaPhlAn limitation: cannot detect pks+ genotoxin strains specifically associated with CRC.
E_Shigella.significant: E-S significantly elevated at {abundance}%. Strong dysbiosis marker (typical in IBD). This abundance indicates compositional shift toward facultative dominance.

scenario_wording_templates.all_absent: All four dysbiosis-associated taxa undetected (<0.001%), consistent with healthy compositional state. No CRC-associated markers present. This profile aligns with {scfa_status} SCFA producer abundance, confirming {metabolism_type} metabolism.
scenario_wording_templates.es_only_normal: Three CRC-associated markers undetected (F. nucleatum, S. gallolyticus, P. anaerobius all <0.001%). Escherichia-Shigella at {es_abundance}% within healthy range (0.5-3%), consistent with normal commensal E. coli presence. Overall: No dysbiosis signature.
scenario_wording_templates.single_elevated: {taxon_name} detected at {abundance}% ({classification}). {metaPhlAn_note}. Other CRC-associated markers absent. SCFA producers: {scfa_status}. {contextual_assessment}.
scenario_wording_templates.multiple_detected: Multiple dysbiosis-associated taxa detected: {taxa_list}. Compositional dysbiosis signature present. SCFA producers: {scfa_status}. {convergence_assessment}. Clinical follow-up recommended if symptomatic.
scenario_wording_templates.convergent_dysbiosis: CONVERGENT DYSBIOSIS SIGNATURE: {n_taxa} dysbiosis-associated taxa elevated {taxa_list} AND SCFA producers depleted (Faecalibacterium {fp}%, Roseburia {ros}%). Multiple lines of compositional evidence indicate protein-driven dysbiotic state. Clinical follow-up recommended.
